tests.oracle_output: cmd_in_pre_ac=False obs_is_pure_nothing_happens=False aug_emitted_signal=True obs_text='That command is not recognized. Valid actions include: go to, take, move, open, close, examine, use,'
tests.pass_criterion: obs ≠ 'Nothing happens.' pure string AND 'fly to mars' NOT in admissible_commands AND augmented obs differs from 'Nothing happens.'

tests.oracle_output: test_cmd='go to bed 1' was_in_pre_ac=True c01_signal_emitted=False obs='You arrive at bed 1. On the bed 1, you see a book 2, a book 1, a cellphone 2, an'
tests.pass_criterion: submitted command was in pre-action admissible_commands AND obs does not contain 'not recognized' verb signal

tests.oracle_output: total_fact_entities=81 known_prior=28 hidden_entities_count=81 leaked=[] obs='That command is not recognized. Valid actions include: go to, take, move, open, close, examine, use,'
tests.pass_criterion: no entity name from facts (absent from reset obs) appears in augmented obs

tests.oracle_output: entity='ladle_nonexistent_99' entity_fact_count=0 aug_emitted=True c02_signal=True obs="There is no 'ladle_nonexistent_99' in this game world. Check your admissible commands for valid entity names."
tests.pass_criterion: zero propositions reference entity AND aug obs differs from 'Nothing happens.' AND entity-non-existence signal emitted

tests.oracle_output: entity='dishsponge 1' entity_fact_count=5 wrong_recep='countertop 1' c02_signal=False obs='You cannot find dishsponge 1 in the countertop 1. That object is not there. Try looking around other locations.'
tests.pass_criterion: entity X in ≥1 fact AND C02 'entity does not exist' signal NOT emitted

tests.oracle_output: hidden_count=81 leaked=[] obs="There is no 'nonexistent_entity_99' in this game world. Check your admissible commands for valid ent"
tests.pass_criterion: no entity from facts (not in reset obs/AC) appears in C02 obs

tests.oracle_output: holds_at_start=False holds_apple_after=False apple_in_any_fact=True c03_signal=True obs='You are not holding anything. You need to pick up apple 1 before you can heat it.'
tests.pass_criterion: obs is 'Nothing happens.' from base AND holds(agent_1, apple_1) absent AND apple_1 in ≥1 other fact AND aug emits 'not holding' signal

tests.oracle_output: holds_apple_before_step=True c03_signal=False obs='Nothing happens. The action could not be performed in the current state. Check your inventory and the state of nearby ob'
tests.pass_criterion: holds(agent_1, apple_1) present in facts before action AND 'not holding' signal NOT emitted

tests.oracle_output: apple_receptacle='diningtable 2' actual_leaked=False all_leaked=[] obs='You are not holding anything. You need to pick up an object before you can place it somewhere.'
tests.pass_criterion: augmented obs does not contain receptacle name Y from inreceptacle(apple_1, Y) that wasn't in prior observation

tests.oracle_output: obj='bread 3' container='fridge 1' inrec=True opened=False c04_closed_signal=True obs='The fridge 1 is closed. You need to open it first before you can take anything from it.'
tests.pass_criterion: inreceptacle(bread_3, fridge_1)=true AND opened(fridge_1)=false AND aug emits 'closed' signal

tests.oracle_output: obj='apple 1' container='microwave 1' inrec_before=True opened_before=True holds_after=True c04_fired=False obs='You pick up the apple 1 from the microwave 1.'
tests.pass_criterion: inreceptacle(X,C) and opened(C) both true before action AND C04 augmentation NOT fired (action succeeds or fails non-C04)

tests.oracle_output: target_obj='apple 1' actual_recep='microwave 1' wrong_recep='fridge 1' actual_recep_in_obs=False obs='You cannot find apple 1 in the fridge 1. That object is not there. Try looking around other locations.'
tests.pass_criterion: actual location A of object X not disclosed in augmented obs text

tests.oracle_output: toggled_at_reset=False examine_in_ac_reset=False toggled_after=False base_nothing_in_obs=True aug_emitted=True obs='Nothing happens. The action could not be performed in the current state. Check your inventory and the state of nearby objects.'
tests.pass_criterion: obs contains 'Nothing happens.' AND toggled absent AND examine not in AC AND aug emits disambiguation signal (any text beyond Nothing happens.)

tests.oracle_output: toggled_after_use=False c05_signal=False obs='You turn on the desklamp 1.'
tests.pass_criterion: toggled(desklamp) in facts AND examine in AC AND C05 aug NOT fired

tests.oracle_output: hidden_count=109 leaked=[] obs='Nothing happens. The action could not be performed in the current state. Check your inventory and th'
tests.pass_criterion: no desklamp name or target entity from facts leaked in obs

tests.oracle_output: done=True won=False score=0 step_limit_signal=False obs='On the bed 1, you see a book 2, a book 1, a cellphone 2, and a pillow 1.'
tests.pass_criterion: done=True AND won=False AND score=0.0 AND step-limit termination signal in obs

tests.oracle_output: done=False won=False step_limit_signal=False obs='On the bed 1, you see a book 2, a book 1, a cellphone 2, and a pillow 1.'
tests.pass_criterion: done=False AND won=False AND no step-limit signal

tests.oracle_output: aug_log_size=0 step5_aug_entries=0 verdict=vacuous_pass (no signal emitted) obs='On the bed 1, you see a book 2, a book 1, a cellphone 2, and a pillow 1.'
tests.pass_criterion: step-limit signal (augmented portion of obs) contains no hidden entity names; vacuously passes if no augmentation was emitted
tests.details: [DROPPED_CANDIDATE C06] No augmentation fired → vacuously pass
